info.title: AssetPay Public API
info.description: Public trading API - skin deposits, withdrawals, pricing, client endpoints, and identity verification.

tags.name: Client Authentication
tags.description: Client token issuance for trading operations

tags.name: Trading
tags.description: Core trading operations (trade URL check, pricing)

tags.name: Verification
tags.description: Client identity verification via Signicat PictureID (document + selfie)

BearerAuth.description: Merchant or admin JWT access token

ClientToken.description: Client JWT token issued via authenticate-client

post.description: Creates a client JWT token for a Steam user. Requires a merchant API key with CORE_ACCESS scope. The returned token is used by the client for inventory, deposit, and withdrawal endpoints.

400.description: Bad Request - validation failed or invalid input

429.description: Too Many Requests - rate limit exceeded

post.description: Validates a Steam trade URL and checks the user's trade eligibility (bans, escrow, privacy settings). Requires API key with CORE_ACCESS scope. Results are cached for 1 hour unless forceRefresh is true.

400.description: Bad Request - validation failed or invalid input

429.description: Too Many Requests - rate limit exceeded

get.description: Returns the current offer-price book for a given game — the prices AssetPay will pay for each item type. Sourced from AssetPay's pricing service and refreshed periodically. Requires API key with CORE_ACCESS scope.

200.description: List of item offers with prices

400.description: Bad Request - validation failed or invalid input

429.description: Too Many Requests - rate limit exceeded

get.description: Fetches a Steam account's inventory. The merchant passes a tradeUrl per request and AssetPay derives the steamId from it — no client authentication step is needed. Use this to discover items the merchant can sell to AssetPay via /secure/sell.

400.description: Bad Request - validation failed or invalid input

429.description: Too Many Requests - rate limit exceeded

post.description: Initiates a deposit-style trade where the merchant sends their own Steam items to AssetPay in exchange for USD wallet credit. Pricing must match the latest /secure/prices snapshot. Webhooks fire on state changes.

pendingCredit.description: Amount held for hold period in USD

400.description: Bad Request - validation failed or invalid input

429.description: Too Many Requests - rate limit exceeded

post.summary: Buy skins from the marketplace (merchant self-trade)
post.description: Initiates a withdraw-style trade where AssetPay buys the requested listings from the upstream marketplace (Skinshark for CS2, RustSkins for Rust) and delivers them to the supplied tradeUrl. The merchant wallet is debited.

pendingCredit.description: Amount held for hold period in USD

400.description: Bad Request - validation failed or invalid input

429.description: Too Many Requests - rate limit exceeded

get.description: Search and paginate the merchant-facing marketplace. Same listings the merchant's clients see via /client/market.

400.description: Bad Request - validation failed or invalid input

429.description: Too Many Requests - rate limit exceeded

get.summary: Get marketplace listings for one item (merchant self-trade)
get.description: Returns the available listings (price/wear/stickers/etc.) for a specific item type. Pass the resulting item ids to /secure/buy.

400.description: Bad Request - validation failed or invalid input

429.description: Too Many Requests - rate limit exceeded

get.description: Cursor-paginated history of trades initiated via /secure/buy and /secure/sell. End-user client trades are NOT included here — use the merchant module for combined history.

pendingCredit.description: Amount held for hold period in USD

400.description: Bad Request - validation failed or invalid input

429.description: Too Many Requests - rate limit exceeded

get.description: Returns the full record (status, items, collateral, bot info, error) for one trade. Scoped to trades the calling merchant initiated via /secure/*.

pendingCredit.description: Amount held for hold period in USD

429.description: Too Many Requests - rate limit exceeded

get.description: Fetches the authenticated client's Steam inventory with pricing, search, filtering, and pagination. Inventory is cached for 15 minutes unless refresh=true. Includes collateral calculation.

200.description: Client inventory with items, count, and collateral

400.description: Bad Request - validation failed or invalid input

429.description: Too Many Requests - rate limit exceeded

get.description: Returns the authenticated client's trade history with pagination. Can be filtered by trade type (`deposit`/`withdraw`) and game.

pendingCredit.description: Amount held for hold period in USD

400.description: Bad Request - validation failed or invalid input

429.description: Too Many Requests - rate limit exceeded

post.description: Initiates a deposit trade where the client sends skins to the platform. Each item must include the itemId from inventory and the agreed price (USD). Supports instant crediting (isInstant=true) where eligible, or full hold (isInstant=false). Uses distributed locks to prevent race conditions per Steam user.

pendingCredit.description: Amount held for hold period in USD

400.description: Bad Request - validation failed or invalid input

429.description: Too Many Requests - rate limit exceeded

post.description: Initiates a withdrawal trade where the client receives skins from the platform. Each item must include the itemId from the prices endpoint and the agreed price (USD). Maximum 50 items per withdrawal. Price is validated against current offers.

pendingCredit.description: Amount held for hold period in USD

400.description: Bad Request - validation failed or invalid input

429.description: Too Many Requests - rate limit exceeded

post.description:
Initiates a Signicat PictureID verification (document scan + selfie). Returns a `captureUrl` the client should open in a browser or webview to complete the capture. An optional `email` can be provided which is stored on the client record for future identity linking.

**Limits:**
- Returns `VERIFICATION_ALREADY_VERIFIED` if the account is already verified (level >= 1).
- Returns `VERIFICATION_IN_PROGRESS` if an active process was created within the last 30 minutes.
- Returns `VERIFICATION_NOT_AVAILABLE` if Signicat credentials are not configured.

200.description: Verification started  open `captureUrl` in the client.

captureUrl.description: URL to redirect/open for document + selfie capture

400.description: Bad Request - validation failed or invalid input

429.description: Too Many Requests - rate limit exceeded

get.description: Returns the current verification level of the authenticated client, their associated email, the most recent Signicat process (if any), and the linked verified identity (if any).

email.description: Email address associated with this account

captureUrl.description: URL the client should open to complete document capture

latestProcess.description: Most recent verification attempt, or null if none

documentCountry.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code of the document

linkedIdentity.description: Verified identity linked to this account, or null if not yet verified

429.description: Too Many Requests - rate limit exceeded

post.description:
Links the authenticated client's account to an existing verified identity via email match. Use this after a successful verification completes for another account with the same email.

No request body is needed  the identity is looked up automatically by the client's email address (set during the `/start` call).

**Requirements:**
- The client must have an email set on their account (provided during `/start`).
- A verified identity with a matching email must exist (case-insensitive).
- The identity must not be banned.
- The identity must not have reached its maximum linked account limit.

On success, the account's `verificationLevel` is immediately upgraded to `1` (picture_id).

200.description: Account successfully linked to the verified identity

400.description: Bad Request - validation failed or invalid input

429.description: Too Many Requests - rate limit exceeded
